grades.expectation: Response identifies 68 years as a critical lease length issue
grades.reason: Clearly identifies 68 years as 'CRITICAL (<70 years)' band with material impact

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific lender names and their minimum requirements (not just 'most lenders want 70+ years')
grades.reason: Lists specific lenders (Barclays, Halifax/Lloyds, TSB, etc.) with their exact eligibility requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions marriage value applies below 80 years
grades.reason: Explicitly discusses marriage value inclusion below 80 years and 50% payable amount

grades.expectation: Response discusses lease extension options (statutory Section 42, informal, assign benefit)
grades.reason: Covers both statutory Section 42 and informal extensions, plus assignability of notice to buyer

grades.expectation: Response quantifies the price impact (discount percentage or range)
grades.reason: Provides specific discount range of 'mid-to-high single digits up to ~15%'

grades.expectation: Response mentions reduced buyer pool due to mortgage restrictions
grades.reason: States 'buyer pool shrinks sharply' and explains shift to cash buyers/specialist lending
